'''Bartam''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
He [[Anti-Sith conspiracy|conspired]] with Grand Moff [[Trachta]] and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kadir (Moff)|Kadir]] to kill [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], but tensions amongst the conspirators led to infighting, and Bartam had [[Gauer]], another of the conspirators, shoot Trachta.

However, just after Trachta's murder, another conspirator, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Skosef]], killed Bartam only to be killed himself by Bartam's [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] guard.

{{Char-stub}}
